---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point.

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Describe the ideal behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any other approaches? Why is this one better?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references that help explain the feature.
